allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Studio v7 workspace setup design document

Design covers sequential dependency-order setup for all 6 repos:
- studio-workspace \(parent\)
- studio-contracts \(types\)
- studio-ralph \(RALPH loop\)
- studio-runner \(agent runner\)
- studio-engine \(orchestrator\)
- studio-cli \(CLI interface\)

Approach: Build each repo in dependency order with validation at each step.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Studio v7 workspace setup implementation plan

Comprehensive 36-task plan with bite-sized steps for setting up:
- Parent workspace with scripts and setup.sh
- @studio/contracts \(types, zero dependencies\)
- @studio/ralph \(RALPH loop engine\)
- @studio/runner \(multi-provider agent runner\)
- @studio/engine \(pipeline orchestrator\)
- @studio/cli \(CLI interface\)

Sequential dependency-order build with validation at each step.
Each task is 2-5 minutes with exact commands and expected output.

Ready for execution with superpowers:executing-plans or subagent-driven-development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
